# AI Design Canarias

## What we do
AI Design Canarias is a web design and AI agency based in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Spain.
We build professional websites, e-commerce stores, and AI-powered tools for local businesses in Gran Canaria and the Canary Islands.

## Services
- Professional web design (delivered in 7–14 days)
- AI chatbot integration for businesses
- Local SEO and search positioning
- E-commerce and online stores
- Visual identity and branding
- Web maintenance and support
- Digital consulting

## Key differentiators
- 7–14 day delivery (no long waits)
- No lock-in contracts
- 24/7 AI-powered support
- Based in Gran Canaria — serving local businesses in Spanish

## Contact
- Website: https://aidesigncanarias.com
- Email: info@aidesigncanarias.com
- Phone: +34 605 007 753
- Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Gran Canaria, Canary Islands, Spain

## Service area
Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Gran Canaria, Islas Canarias, Spain
